full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #44 (2026-05-27)

PULSE
Health: 0.4671 (C). 1020 wallets, 279 contributors. 83 memos yesterday vs 127 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
40 reward payments, 244884 PFT distributed to 12 contributors. Top earner: rhwiJx...2TaE (111500 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 6,300 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (6,300 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (14,500 PFT, avg 7,250/day over 2 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (36 memos). Fastest new contributor: rfJnDJ...5AB1 (6.0 memos/day in 1 days). 9 new wallet(s) this week. 57 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 71.9%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-27): 173 transactions from 28 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
